exploration_notes: The core validator implementations (URLValidator, EmailValidator, MinValueValidator, MaxLengthValidator, and their base classes RegexValidator and BaseValidator) all live in django/core/validators.py. The model full_clean() validation pipeline is in django/db/models/base.py, which calls clean_fields() → each field's validate() and run_validators(). Field-level validate() and run_validators() are defined in django/db/models/fields/__init__.py (with overrides in related.py and json.py). The forms-
